C:\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\cblas_tests.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\cblas_tests.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\cblas_tests.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\gcc.exe -mwindows -mconsole -Wl,--subsystem,console -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\cblas_tests.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o cblas_tests.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libcblas_tests.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\cblas_tests.dir\linkLibs.rsp
